data.title: S&T Bancorp, Inc. to Host First Quarter Earnings Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: S&T Bancorp, Inc., the parent company of S&T Bank, based in Indiana, Pennsylvania, revealed its plans for a live conference call to discuss its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. The call, scheduled for Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 1:00 pm Eastern Time, will be accessible through a webcast. S&T Bancorp, Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol STBA. This announcement signifies the company's efforts to provide transparency and communication with shareholders and the public regarding its fiscal results.

IDF: Initial report - The IDF has identified the launch of a missile from Yemen toward Israeli territory, aerial defense systems are operating to intercept the threat. The public is requested to follow the Home Front Command’s defensive guidelines.

data.title: Peri Launches First Wearable Device Designed Specifically for Perimenopause
data.description: A company specializing in women's health, Peri, has introduced a groundbreaking wearable device tailored for women to empower them with accurate data. The device equips women to actively engage in their healthcare, advocating for themselves in a healthcare system that has often disregarded their needs. The product launch took place in Dublin on April 2, 2026.

data.title: U.S. Lumber Coalition: Canada's New Softwood Lumber Subsidies Exceed C$2 Billion - Solely to Prop Up Canada's Massive and Harmful Excess Lumber Exports
data.description: In the past seven months, the Canadian federal and provincial governments have jointly revealed new taxpayer-funded subsidies exceeding C$2.1 billion for the Canadian forestry sector. This decision was made following the implementation of U.S. antidumping and countervailing measures.

data.title: ONDA Attorneys Again Recognized Among Texas’ Top Family Lawyers in 2026 Super Lawyers Guide
data.description: Sixteen lawyers from the Texas family law firm Orsinger, Nelson, Downing & Anderson (ONDA) have been acknowledged in the field of family law for 2026. They have been listed on both the Texas Super Lawyers and Rising Stars rankings. Among them, four of the attorneys have been honored as Texas Super Lawyers, which is a designation given to only the top 5% of lawyers. This includes name partners Richard R. Orsinger, Keith M. Nelson, R. Scott Downing, and Jeffrey O. Anderson, along with eight other firm partners: William M. Reppeto III, Brad M. LaMorgese, Amb...

data.title: GigaIO Sells Groundbreaking Datacenter Technology and Assets to d-Matrix
data.description: A company based in Carlsbad, California, specializing in scalable AI platforms, GigaIO, has recently made a strategic decision to sell its innovative datacenter technology. The move aims to shift the company's focus towards delivering datacenter-grade computing solutions directly to the edge. This decision indicates a shift in the company's business strategy to adapt to the growing demand for edge computing solutions in the current market.

data.title: The Real Brokerage Inc. Named to Financial Times List of The Americas’ Fastest Growing Companies 2026
data.description: Ranked at the top of the Financial Times List of The Americas’ Fastest Growing Companies 2026, The Real Brokerage based in Miami has secured the prestigious No. 1 spot. This achievement solidifies their position as a leading residential real estate brokerage in the region.

data.title: United Real Estate Expands East and West Coast Presence with Allison James Estates and Homes
data.description: United® Real Estate has recently broadened its reach by integrating Allison James Estates and Homes into its national network. This addition welcomes 725 agents from various states including California, Florida, Maryland, D.C., Nevada, Texas, Massachusetts, and Virginia. The move aims to strengthen United's presence across different regions and boost its capabilities to serve a wider client base.

data.title: Pizza Nova Signs Multi-Year Agreement With Oak View Group to Become the Official Pizza of the TD Coliseum, Delivering Authentic, Premium Pizza to Consumers
data.description: Pizza Nova, based in Hamilton, Ontario, has recently announced a multi-year partnership with Oak View Group. This agreement designates Pizza Nova as the official pizza provider for TD Coliseum. The partnership aims to bring their authentic and high-quality pizzas directly to consumers attending events at the venue. This collaboration is set to enhance the overall experience for attendees and introduce Pizza Nova's offerings to a wider audience.

data.title: ClimeCo Expands Digitization Capabilities through Partnership with Greenly, an AI-driven Carbon Accounting and Decarbonization Platform
data.description: In Houston on April 2, 2026, ClimeCo, a renowned company specializing in sustainability advisory and environmental market solutions, revealed a new partnership with Greenly, a top player in greenhouse gas accounting and sustainability management. This collaboration aims to provide quicker and more cost-effective solutions for their clients.
